data.description: BoJ's Governor Ueda: No change to our view that we expect underlying inflation to be around 2% from second half of fy 2026.

data.title: Agenda for Essity's Capital Markets Day Accelerating progress by sharpening focus and execution
data.description: A hygiene and health company, Essity, is scheduled to host its Capital Markets Day in Gothenburg, Sweden on May 7, 2026. The event will commence at 09:00 CET and is anticipated to end around 13:00. Participants will gain insights into Essity Group's strategies and future plans during the agenda.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda noted that underlying inflation has not fully stabilized at the 2% level.

data.title: SINEXCEL Powers Latvia's Largest Wind Farm Energy Storage Project with Advanced 1725kW PCS
data.description: In Tārgale, Latvia, on April 28, 2026, SINEXCEL, a leading power inverter manufacturer ranked Tier 1 by BloombergNEF in 2026, has provided twelve Power Conversion Systems (PCS) each with a capacity of 1725kW for a significant wind farm energy storage initiative in the country. This project includes a 20.64MWh battery energy storage system situated alongside...
SHIN-ETSU WITHHOLDS FY FORECASTS ON MIDDLE EAST SITUATION

data.title: Beyond Simulation: Sungrow Completes World's First Large-Scale Full-Condition Grid-Forming Extreme Test
data.description: In HEFEI, China, as of April 28, 2026, Sungrow, a top provider of PV inverters and energy storage systems worldwide, achieved the world's initial significant grid-forming full-scenario validation. This project encompassed 14 different scenarios over a span of 138 hours and was carried out independently.
According to BOJ Governor Ueda, Japan’s economy has a moderate level of resilience.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda noted that Middle East uncertainty has reduced the chances of the price and economic outlook playing out as expected.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda said the BOJ will act appropriately on monetary policy to avoid lagging behind the curve.
According to BOJ Governor Ueda, the BOJ prefers to spend more time evaluating how Middle East conditions may influence Japan’s economy, prices, and goal achievement.

data.title: Valmet to start change negotiations regarding temporary layoffs in Finland
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Valmet Oyj announced that they would be initiating change negotiations in Finland as per the Finnish Co-operation Act starting on May 4, 2026. The plan being discussed during these negotiations may involve temporary layoffs affecting a portion of their workforce. The company is taking these measures to navigate through challenging times and adjust their operations accordingly.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda said the BOJ will keep increasing interest rates while adjusting the level of monetary support according to economic, price, and financial conditions.
According to BOJ Governor Ueda, board member Takata recommended adding a reference that CPI has already achieved the target level.

data.title: OpenLegacy Japan and Deloitte Tohmatsu Form Strategic Alliance to Advance Legacy System Modernization
data.description: OpenLegacy Japan Co., Ltd. in Tokyo announced a strategic alliance helping enterprises with mainframe-dependent infrastructure. The alliance encourages gradual migration and hybrid architecture approaches. This alliance aims to support companies in transitioning their mainframe systems. Masahiko Shimoyama leads the Japanese branch of OpenLegacy. The announcement was made on April 28, 2026.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda noted that Tamura proposed including wording in the outlook report stating underlying inflation aligns with the inflation target.

data.title: Tezos X to launch Testnet in May 2026, combining EVM and Michelson for enhanced scalability and interoperability.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, Tezos X has announced the integration of EVM and Michelson on a common ledger, aiming to boost scalability and interoperability within its network. The testnet for this innovative integration is set to go live in May 2026. This move is poised to significantly increase the efficiency and capabilities of the Tezos X platform, marking a crucial step forward in the evolution of decentralized networks. This fusion of technologies is anticipated to revolutionize the way transactions are processed and applications are built on the Tezos X ecosystem, ultimately shaping the future of blockchain technology.

data.title: OpenAI rolls out Symphony to enhance Codex orchestration, aimed at boosting engineering workflows with agent-driven task automation.
data.description: OpenAI has unveiled Symphony, a new open-source specification designed to enhance Codex orchestration. This initiative aims to improve engineering workflows by leveraging agent-driven task automation. Symphony is poised to revolutionize software development processes and drive efficiency in handling complex tasks. This innovation marks a significant advancement in the field, offering developers a powerful tool to streamline their work. To learn more about Symphony and its impact on engineering, visit the official announcement.

data.title: Tether unveils open-source toolkit MDK for Bitcoin mining to streamline ops. Aimed at unifying infrastructure - impact on the market explained.
data.description: Tether has unveiled MDK, a new open-source toolkit designed for Bitcoin mining with the goal of consolidating scattered infrastructure. This move could significantly impact the market by fostering greater cohesion and efficiency within the mining sector. The introduction of MDK represents a crucial step towards standardizing mining practices and enhancing overall productivity in the industry. The toolkit's release is expected to streamline operations, increase collaboration, and potentially lead to improved performance across the board. This development has the potential to shape the future landscape of Bitcoin mining, as it aims to address existing fragmentation issues and drive greater consistency within the ecosystem. Industry experts anticipate that the adoption of MDK could pave the way for a more streamlined and interconnected mining environment, ultimately benefiting stakeholders and users alike.
According to BOJ Governor Ueda, policymakers need to be alert to the risk of additional economic slowdown based on supply shock conditions.

data.title: Securitas AB Interim Report Q1 2026 | January-March
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, total sales in Stockholm reached MSEK 36,211, a decrease from the previous year's MSEK 39,606. There was no organic sales growth compared to a 3% growth in the same period last year. Adjusted organic sales growth stood at 2%. Real sales growth within technology and solutions was 4%, slightly less than the 5% growth recorded previously. Operating income before amortization was MSEK 2,459, up from MSEK 2 million in the prior year.
